description_long: This is a female adult pedestrian with an athletic build, wearing a sleeveless crop top and a short wrap skirt adorned with a bold floral pattern. She has a flower tucked behind her ear and a high ponytail hairstyle. Her outfit is accessorized with fingerless gloves, an arm band, and a thigh holster, giving her a sporty and slightly tactical appearance. She is wearing open-toed sandals with ankle straps. Visible tattoos and a confident stance add to her urban, streetwise look. The overall appearance suggests she is ready for active movement in a city environment.
description: Athletic female adult in a crop top and wrap skirt, accessorized with gloves, a flower, and a high ponytail, exuding a sporty urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the crop top, wrap skirt with floral pattern, gloves, flower accessory, and confident stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, flower behind the ear, and the profile of the wrap skirt and sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the crop top, ponytail, and the full wrap of the skirt, as well as the arm band and holster.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the arm band, tattoo, holster, and the side profile of the gloves and sandals.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless crop top and short wrap skirt with fingerless gloves and an arm band
